channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS???? — 34 replies — 136.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:38 UTC

OP

I CANT STAND WAGING HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????

Early replies (first 3)

62165377
>>62165360
Become an overnight security guard with a site in a rich area that’s internal (you’re inside a building).

The golden goose is MAG7 tech companies. I’ve literally and unironically done security for google. Max comfy

62165379
>>62165360
I do. I work like ~5 hours a day and play on my phone while eating a ton of corporate junk food and hitting on the co-workers for the rest. Must be a skill issue.

62165445
>>62165360
E Z ly
U just week

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62165614
>>62165360
Waging used to get you enough money to buy a house in a White area, get a foid and still have enough money left over to save. Now waging doesn't provide you enough to do any of that, so its pointless.

62165647
I've had it free seating in open landscapes, I'm switching from 90% office presence to 90% wfh.

62165675
>>62165360
When you become an adult and have to wage, you either become a soulless wagie husk, kill yourself, or become a NEET. That's what they don't tell you growing up. Life is a scam.

62165695
>>62165360
there's only 1 thing worse than being a wagie, and that's applying to be a wagie and being rejected

62165737
when I was young I'd get excited over changing the world with my ideas and becoming a big shot at my company
now I just wanna get out and retire ASAP
where did it all go wrong
I wonder how many of us are like this

62165765
>>62165360
>ugh i hate swimming how do people do this for x years instead of just drowning
you will look back at this point in time as relative golden age, affordable food, relative high trust, available work as a means to sustain yourself. you have no idea how bad its going to get.

62165773
>>62165360
I hate waging so much, it only becomes bearable when I take adderall and zap my brain, rendering me a soulless NPC. Rotting away in my little wage cage. Unfortunately (or maybe fortunately) this is not sustainable for 30+ years.

62165800
>>62165773
>>62165647
Oh yeah and you 100% need to secure a job that is at least 1 day minimum WFH per week (2 to further keep your sanity). I'd actually kill myself if I had to be in the office at 8am 5 days a week, that's not a life worth living.

62165806
>>62165737
>where did it all go wrong
when you realized that most "people" are not

62165808
>>62165360
The key is to lose hope. Once you lose hope it's easier to live in hell. That's a lesson I've learned from my waging years

62165811
>>62165360
I got rich on my own and then went to a government job for fun, prestige. Agreed.

Especially if you're not making bookoobucks it'd be soul crushingly hellish to earn baby money in some bleh position, a really significant amount that goes to paying for transportation, food and clothes specific to the office.

It's especially wild for women to do this shit in Jewish daycare when they could just stay home and between the not-commuting, the better home make meals

62165817
>>62165360
WFH at least hybrid solutions or fully remote, 40hr contracts MAX and 35hr ideal, im using 20hr+ a week to put into my own businesses and side hustles to supplement my income and eventually if fortunate enough replace my job.

62165830
>>62165377
What is the pay and bennies like? Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?

62165918
>>62165811
Women enjoy keeping society running.

62166277
>>62165811
Women on average are a bit less smart than men, but this means there is a giant glut of midwit women more than midwit men, and the midwits especially fall for Jewish and feminist talking points.

62166475
>>62165379
We have a room at work with big comfy chairs where we all sleep and watch movies, we work 13hrs but at the most actually go and do 3 hours of work.

62166487
>>62165830
>Wouldn't all the tech companies just automate security?
they're fucking retarded, anon

62166489
Wagies are spiritually unwell to do what they do. I pray for them nightly.

62166493
Their soul slowly erodes and they become hollow shells of who they used to be.

62166854
>>62165811
Being a SAHM is actually harder than doing nothing in the office all day.

>But what about the mind numbing boringness!

Remember women are great at socialization and finding things to talk about. Unlike a man who will become le office space women just find ways to get through the boredom. I'm not justifying their behavior, I just know that the average western woman isn't as tough as her ancestors 100+ years ago.

62166949
>>62165360
Idk. My job is really good and I’ve been doing it 15 years, the only job I’ve ever been able to do this long, and it’s still hell.

62166970
>>62166949
Same, my job is good for what it is. I've only been in the workforce for 5 years and I think I'm going to kill myself.

62167031
>>62165377
You’re essentially lower class.
>>62165806
When you realize 99% of people are born to work.

62168374
>>62166493
I fear that is already happening to me :(

62168766
>>62166949
>>62166970
Sounds like no matter what you did, you’d still bitch about everything.

62168822
my job is ok, but it's annoying to have to come in when I could do it all remotely, too bad I can't quit and neet but I like my lakehouse and boat too much to give them up.

62168835
Idk, I work 18 hours a week as a teacher for 2000€ and it's already too much work, how do you guys do 40 hours a week I will never understand

62171668
>>62165360
>HOW THE FUCK DO PEOPLE DO THIS FOR 30+ YEARS????
1) they have low standards
2) they'r NPCs just following orders
3) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to end themselves
4) they hate every minute of it and use that hatred to keep going
5) they hate every minute of it but are too scared to take risks

62171714
>>62165830
And how will these cameras and locks stop criminals?
Human presence alone deters 90% of potential theft.
>t. zoom zooms and niggers see me and v line the other way

62172531
>>62165360
The trick is you don't live long enough to ever really finish. it's a shell game where you believe that at the end there is something better waiting for you when really if you didn't have it to begin with you were never going to have it.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:41 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172423
>>62172420
This guy gets it!

62172425
why did something like that never happen to me

62172428
>>62172412

62172430
>>62172413

62172431
>>62172420
private :(

instagram.com/lornamh/

62172432
>give women power
>femcels try to buckbreak finance chads
>she was only caught because she fucked kids too

62172439
>>62172412
>executive
>37
Women really need to be fed into woodchippers.

62172448
>In early May 2024, Doe alleges Hajdini dropped her pen on the floor next to his desk and, while bending to pick it up, rubbed his leg and squeezed his calf.
>‘You’re gonna need to earn it, my little Arab boy toy,’ Doe alleges she told him during a work social event at her private members club. During the same event, he claims she repeatedly groped his groin under the table and spat in her hands, running them over his neck and head.
>Doe also claimed Hajdini used her executive status to gain unauthorized access to his bank account to track his ‘every move.’
>During the second encounter, Hajdini allegedly ordered him to suck her toes, pushed him to the ground and sat on his face, berating him when he was unable to sustain arousal.

>dailymail.com/news/article-15776897/JPMorgan-executive-banker-sex-abuse-lawsuit-new-york.html

>archive.is/yUmJl

62172454
>>62172412
>white woman
>named hajdini
>white

62172469
>>62172454
You can tell that this right here is a bad bitch

62172476
>>62172454
looks like Gary Vee

62172540
>>62172448
man some guys get all the luck. Not only that he gets to sue jpm for lots of money.

item.title: WE EATIN GOOD TONIGHT — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WE EATIN GOOD TONIGHT

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:38 UTC

OP

cryptoniggers miss out on all the good plays
enjoy your rugpulls. as usual crudechads stay winning

>will be fullporting the retracement

Early replies (first 3)

62172382
>>62172378
I really don't understand how crypto zoomers stay in one asset class, thinking anything else is for boomers. They don't understand how to use options to get the same kind of leverage that used to be possible in crypto back in 2017.

62172386
Trump and his army of fake news faggots on twitter caused me to miss out on the entire run up

62172392
>>62172382
stocks/crypto are for the uneducated poors
simple as
being addicted to losing is real
if getting rugged for the hundredth time didnt make you rethink how you interacted with the markets, you werent meant to make it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172447
>>62172378
>Brent just hit $124
lmao this shit will be $130 by morning

62172458
>>62172447
doubt it my negro
it will take a day or two
gotta retrace for the (special people) to enter
i am about to enter short

62172489
>short it

62172517
>>62172378
>as usual crudechads stay winning
below 2008, the year before bitcoin's existence

62172532
>>62172517
price != movement
movement is where money is made
i wouldn't expect a cryptogoy like yourself to know this, given you retards baghold shitcoins that only crab

>we are back in

item.title: doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century — 15 replies — 28.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:14 UTC

OP

>labor market stable, jobs looking good; extraordinary hiring in march, probably in april too
>fed realizes this, keeps rates steady because there is no inflation
>consumers spending big time, projected to spend even more in the summer
>all MAG 7 companies beat earnings
>stock market at ATH
>economy at ATH
>oil cheaper than expected despite hormuz "crisis"
>Iran in fucking shambles as it turns out NOBODY NEEDS HORMUZ
>OPEC gets BTFO'd by lord Trump
wow, turns out blocking the straits helps the world more than it hurts it. what made you realize it was a scam strait?

Early replies (first 3)

62172011
>>62172001
bears missed the fact that 110 dollar oil today is 80 dollars 6 years ago. its no big deal.

62172080
>>62172001
You’re delusional. Oil is going to $400 and SPX is going to 2k.

62172102
>>62172080
Last time someone said this on /biz/ I laughed in their face as oil plummeted back down to $70.

The next day I posted asking where that idiot was that said oil was going to $200 and a bunch of street-shitting turd-skinned third worlder ESL's came into the thread trying to gaslight about how when they said oil was going to $200, they weren't talking about WTI futures, they were talking about buying the Indian basket lmaooo.

This board just reeks of disgusting turd worlders. I hate it here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172107
Can the plummeting gas prices come to central Indiana yet

62172109
>>62172001
they expected a 15% decrease (other places increased production and rerouted from homuz so its not 20% anymore) in global oil availability to result in 3x oil prices I guess

62172114
>>62172107
Bro it's like $4 and Braun already paused the gas tax. We're doing better than most of the country

62172141
>>62172114
Since when is $4 a good gas price unless you're selling gas?
If we're doing better than most of the country, I understand even more why people are mad

62172143
You don’t know how job numbers work do you

62172157
>>62172001
If you were looking for a top signal. Here you go.

62172177
>>62172001

Your stock markets fate is literally in the hands of brown people in the desert. The day they decide to start shooting missiles again oil goes to $150 overnight (probably more now since it closed 122 today) and the SPX limits down as the back end goes to 5.5%

Guess don’t get unlucky holding your hot potato call options?

62172178
>>62172157
Smartest guy in the room and he can't even read the thread: >>62172080

I think we have counterbalancing signals, smart guy. Let's see your shorts though, put your money where your mouth is and show your work.

You won't because you're a fucking pussy who doesn't believe anything he posts.

62172203
>>62172001
>The stock market can never go down again! Welcome to the GOLDEN AGE! ATH! ATH! ATH!
>t. some retard every time market instability pushed an ATH right before the crash

62172398
>>62172001
>doomer scam: most irrelevant nothingburger of the century
is this a new angle for the glowie narrative? that the war america lost is irrelevant and therefore can be forgotten quickly? that oil and fuel prices are not that expensive and will fall overnight? that the stock market is great, and therefore the economy is doing just fine?

I've read a lot of comments like this today. been wondering if they are automated. I guess this confirms they are posted by """AI""".

62172451
>>62172001
>please stop pumping oil $$$
>stop buying oil $$$
>you are treating crude like it is a tech stock
>we are doing fine, we do not need to go panic mode on oil
>"have you shorted your oil yet?"

I'm onto you and your tricks. I will put a long on crude when markets open.

62172471
in 2020 I lost my job making 80k a year. Just read that story abotu the 38yo female "executive" (why do women get promoted to CEO positions before they're even 40? sus)

Since then I've repeatedly almost made it on 10 different occasions but I always get fudded outu by SHIT like this and totally retarded doomer bears insisting this time it's time.

I don't know why because I get brainfog and emotional when I see my portfolio down 2000 bucks, so I'll set a sell at break even, get out 3 months later, then watch as it uptrends and breaks out.

I'm pretty sure by now the stress and isolation has given me brain damage. If I could just get two remote jobs I would do that instead but I'm not even allowed to be a tech wagie either.

item.title: HAPPENING: Fertilizer Shortage Causes Supply Value to 2x — 8 replies — 25.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
HAPPENING: Fertilizer Shortage Causes Supply Value to 2x

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:27 UTC

OP

The Iran war is setting up a shortage of urea fertilizer, which is already driving up prices, and will disrupt the food supply, sooner or later.

The world fertilizer market is worth, roughly, 290 Billion UDS according to fertilizer.com, and 30% of the world supply moves through, and is currently blocked within the straight of Hormuz. In the past month, the price has doubled, from roughly $400 to $720. Which means that the big money is yet to be made, we are Early.

Anons could speculate in high Nitrogen fertilizer and profit from the misery and poverty of the 3rd world to line our pockets, and laugh in our mustaches and cigar smoke

Early replies (first 3)

62172095
Oh no the third world will starve to death? Not my problem.

62172132
>>62172085
I got your urea... RIGHT HEEERE!
*pees on u*

62172159
>>62172095
Not your problem, your opportunity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172166
>>62172085
I loaded up on CF, IPI, and NTR years ago :)

62172345
>>62172159
Should I buy some actual bags soon too?

62172376
>>62172345
You SHOULD buy bags. My bags!

62172480
>>62172085
My MOS and NTR stocks arent doing anything right now... so nice thesis that maybe confirm itself in 2 weeks!

62172505
>>62172085

OP

what a freak!!!!

No one with a cock under 9x7" deserves pussy

WHO keeps buying?!?!?!?!?

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:22 UTC

OP

It's fucking exasperating at this point just let it dump ffs

Early replies (first 3)

62172106
The universe will not allow saylor and tom lee to continue messing up the natural order of things and will create some terrible event that brings the prices down where they would otherwise be.

62172444
>>62172096
Gaylord and lee.

62172488
why are bobos so anxious lately

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

item.title: >Paul Tudor Jones recently warned that U.S. — 9 replies — 4.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Paul Tudor Jones recently warned that U.S.

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-30 02:48 UTC

OP

>Paul Tudor Jones recently warned that U.S. equities are extremely overvalued at 252% of GDP—far above 65% in 1929, ~85-90% in 1987, and 170% in 2000.

>He said a mean-reversion 30-35% stock market drop would destroy wealth equivalent to 80-90% of GDP, wipe out capital gains tax revenue (about 10% of total taxes), balloon the budget deficit, hammer the bond market, and trigger a dangerous negative self-reinforcing cycle that could severely damage the economy.
Stay patient Bobo chads, our time is coming.

Early replies (first 3)

62171974
>>62171693
I'm waiting with my money to buy houses when shit hits the fan.
I remember stuff in the PNW short selling for $75,000 cash in 2009-2010.
Same houses are are all $800,000+ now.

Normal fags have no savings, take advantage of it

62171982
>>62171693
>US GDP
>global companies
lmao

62172097
>>62171974
But won't they just inflate away any problems? You have to sell the top otherwise that 30% drop is nothing compared to the missed gains.
But yeah at some point people are going to pull their money and it will create a deluge. Normalfags are living way too large.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62172112
>>62171982
OP, read this and weep.

62172137
>>62171693
Let's see Paul Penis Jones's put positions so I can verify whether or not he truly believes in his thesis or not.

62172182
>>62172097
Too long didn't read

62172205
>>62172182
Houses aren't going to go down 90%

62172278
>>Paul Tudor Jones recently warned that U.S. equities
All together? Like all the market gains in the last decade went to ten companies. It's ridiculous to analyze ALL us equities without splitting the over-performers out.

There's probably an options case for just rotating mid term puts out each months and pay the premium to catch the inevitable "black swan" massive drop. I bet Taleb's even doing it.

62172290
>>62171693
Yeah but debt to gdp has never been so high and we are digging the debt hole deeper at an accelerating pace.

item.title: >tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this? — 113 replies — 88.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>tfw fell for the NEET meme how the fuck can you guys endure this?

Open thread • Replies: 113 • Updated: 2026-04-30 03:30 UTC

OP

>tfw fell for the NEET meme
how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5

Early replies (first 3)

62156768
I would unironically wagecuck still if I was able to take vacation whenever I want. I don't enjoyed scheduling things like that or requiring permission.

62156775
>>62156751
I became a neet because of crippling social anxiety, not out of choice.
I suspect many are the same.

62156779
>>62156751
see you fell for it without having any money, I did that once and then realized that it costs money to do anything other than sit in front of a screen all day every day

Depending on where you live, even going out for a walk will cost you bus fare or gas to get to a decent park. Never felt so trapped, now if I had money to go out and do things like camping or fishing or even just cook nice meals then I would have been a lot happier

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62164110
>>62156751
the NEET life is a perfect mirror.
if you are depressed and bored as a NEET, you are simply meant to be a slave.
There is nothing else to say.

62164118
>>62156795
this is the move, anon.
im an electrical engineering student and my plan is to take my intern cash and start a biz while working remote somewhere.
good luck

62164142
>>62156838
Let me guess, your hobbies are going on 4chan and masturbating

62164460
>NEETs when you ask them to show you some of the art and projects they "have time to create since they're not a slave like you"

62164470
>>62164460
i've beaten my favorite game nearly 5 times in the past month and wrote some genderbent DEI thot getting raped and mindbroken
how 'bout u?

62164922
>>62156751
simple i wasn't born a slave with a pink id

62165197
>>62164460
Is it so difficult to grasp why somebody who isn't compelled to conform to working their whole life is also not compelled to try and impress somebody who is?

62165794
>>62156775
yeah i never had a job because i keep sperging out in the few interviews i get

62165803
>>62164460
I just feel bad for their Mom's more than anything.

62165810
>>62157256
AI is based and does the stupid shit I don't want to do
sucks for the accountants that get left out, great for the ones that survive. Bookkeepers / entry level on suicide watch.

62166342
>>62156871
hobbies cost money

62166357
>>62164460
Why would I need to prove you how productive I am. I could rest an entire life and it wouldnt change much about the superiority of the NEET lifestyle.

62166361
>>62156751
Back when I was a neet many years ago I felt like such a god damn loser during the week when all the wagies were off waging. It was pretty bad for my psyche. Looking back those were some of the best days of my life. Especially when I had some good weed. Getting high, smoking cigs, and playing black ops. Fuck those were the glory days

62166616
>>62165197
>>62166357

62166678
>>62156751
>I'm bored with my infinite free time with infinite access to infinite materials online
Unironically kill yourself you worthless braindead carbon emitter
You were born to be a spineless barely sentient farm hand who does nothing but work and eat and die alone for someone else but you were born too late even for that

62166894
>>62158971

62166973
>>62166678
So I actually use the internet to achive productive things. Did research on drones and electric bikes. None of this matters if you have no money to follow through.

62167037
>>62163096
>cured me but dick no longer works
This is me with tramadol.

62167148
>>62164118
>electrical engineering student
unless you are working on boner inducing projects or at an ivy league, i suggest changing majors. these jeets are taking all the jobs

t. EE

62168741
>>62166894
>Got paid $12k to speak at a university
Boomers really did have it easy
Insane how many more opportunities old people have compared to the current generation

62168749
>>62156751
>how the fuck can you guys endure this? it's so boring and depressing, I unironically miss my wagecuck 9-5
You're a failed normie and you're not mentally wired for long term NEET life. Not really saying this to attack you, but it's true. Long term NEETs need some schizoid adjacent type condition, not just any anon can do this, despite a lot having been meme'd into it.

Go back to normie life. It's psychologically necessary for you, it's not a retreat or act of cucking.

62168769
>>62156751
Are you financially set? Can you live off your investments? Big difference between a broke and a rich neet, even between a modest and a poor one. I'm a poor semi-neet (part-time shitty job) and sometimes I genuinely want to kill myself, but mostly because I'm broke.

62171342
>>62156751
>Oy vey, NEETing is bad, understand!!?? Waging is good.

62171475
>>62156751
I would love to join the NEET game, get a hobby, join a club. Make your home cooler. Develop a skill for fun, even if it's just a particular video game.

You sound like the faggots who want wfh to end just because you're bored/boring or hate your home life.
Don't be that kind of faggot.

62171663
>>62156751
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

62172015
I got the job and am still a sexless anti social.
What now?

62172051
Basketball American NEETS have vibrant social lives. You are just a boring loser with or without a job.

62172174
>>62156871
this
>>62159344
so just be bored for a few hours you overstimulated faggot

62172195
>>62156751
Honestly OP, if you don't invest your time in passive income from social media you're retarded.
Generating content for stupid children or boomers is easier than ever, and with no apparent hobbies why not develop passive income streams

62172363
>>62171342
The amount of retards like this that unironically think that not NEETing aka being in work, education, or training is somehow a jewish scheme is proof that we need to cull the weak and comfortable.
100 years ago there was no disability from the government. Hell, even 60 years ago.
Your ancestors worked much more for much less. They absolutely did complain, you will never hear that but no one in history is content. Only NEETS are content. Being content means giving up on living.
Hardly any true NEETs exist, and hardly any would need to be killed/exercised. But those who do are far gone and deserve death, for they are not living.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 160 replies — 39.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 160 • Updated: 2026-04-30 00:43 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62166748
>>62165528
NEETs use inheritance to live extremely low-cost lives. It's quite doable in the modern world. The wagie trap is having a family that consumes resources like crazy, and also having status aspirations. Cut those things and you can live a nice cheap life. You have the internet for at-home entertainment and you can just exercise, meditate, learn to cook, chill with friends, etc.

62166810
>>62166578
That's just so not true. There are a fair amount of people graduating college and getting 60-80k per year jobs and getting a 2021 or newer corolla with ther 6 years of part time savings (part time summer jobs from junior year of highschool until college graduation). And those are just the 23-25 year olds not to mention the ones in their later 20's with actual savings from their full time adult jobs. That anon is right he is slightly behind but because he knows he is behind and is working hard to fix it he will likely be fine in 5-10 years since he knows his mistakes. You on the otherhand live in a fairytale world where "everyone my age with money got it from mommy". Nope. Sorry bud. Some people are skilled and actually have good jobs.

62167025
>>62165090
>being a neet sucks
Says the wagie

62167068
Have any of you started a "business" so you can pretend to your family that you have a job?

62167143
>>62167068
Yeah me. I tell them I run a hedge fund.

62167147
If you can make it to 40-50 as a NEET you have already won the lottery of life. But if you really want to live to be 75+ and retire into a nursing home then you have to work.

62167346
>>62167147
Retire in to a nursing home? What? lol

62167389
>>62167147
https://reddit.com/r/NEET/comments/ifcblr/today_i_became_a_40_year_old_virgin_neet_some/

62167410
>>62158557

62167440
>>62158601
>Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.


You're a robot born to entertain themselves to death while feeding the capitalist system. You're less than human

62167526
>>62167025
read my first post itt, i was a neet for 3 years

62167534
>>62167526
I have been neet my whole life. How about you?

62167920
>>62167534
>I have been neet my whole life.
That's just called being a woman.

62168012
>>62166519
No

62168184
really both suck. having something to do that you truly love its all that matter.

62168378
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago
Same woman has sucked a stranger's dick 10 minutes before she met you.

62168687
>>62158601
Lamo I had no idea I can cause this much seethe looooool
>>62168378
Nah, you say that cause you don’t wanna try.
>>62167440
Less than a human? You really think you use the gift of consciousness better, sitting at home, afraid to challenge yourself?
>>62160048
>humiliation ritual
And you think it’s not for everyone else? You really think everyone goes out and have crazy fun? Dude I seen guys who try and fail. Hell I try and fail every night, but that’s a thing about me. I am insane. Even when it fails, you try again. Until it works.
I think some people just deathly afraid of failing
Shit I WANTED to fail, cause failing would have been the proof that “I didn’t try, because it wouldn’t have work anyway, and being a neet was always better” but then it proved me wrong, that life can be fucking fun and easy at that, and I wasted YEARS, not having fun, not going out, not enjoying my life, listening and being tricked by social media to not even try.
I am almost 32, and my best years are gone being a loser neet who was afraid of trial and failure.

62168693
>>62158666
lol i got a great pc as a neet, you just didnt do it right

62168700
>>62168693
>>62163185
Dude, the amount of shit you can do on a super good pc is astronomical in comparison to a deck.
Ck3, and stellaris are cpu intensive specially in mid to late game cause of massive population boost all over the map, and I got myself a 5k computer to experiance all the glory of it, all my favorite mods available.
>>62159483
Yeah? Maybe. But just imagine this, the amount of motivation you will have, when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you, and then you realize oh no, I don’t have my own place, oh no, I got no money for a hotel, etc
You see what I am picturing here? I mean fuck, I wanna experience shit like that again and fully, and for that I need decent clothes and later a place of my own. a 8/10 moaning into your about ear how much she wants you, how much she loves and needs you, while you don’t have your place is the greatest motivator you can have in life, and if you want that motivation, you need to start waging a bit, so you can at least afford to go out and experience that massive boost of motivation.
Oh and guess how much porn I watched since it happened despite coming home blue balled and pissed? ZERO!
It’s a fucking testosterone shot straight into your brain that wakes you up to what a fucking lie you been living!
Social media lied and fucked me up, despite me not even having an Instagram, YouTube bullshit got me.
Don’t repeat my mistakes, and wake up wishing you didn’t do the shits I did (or didn’t)
I fucking WISH that world rejected me but instead it fucked me up by showing me how wrong I was.

62169232
>>62159483
better than she having you wait while fucking every other dude on a first date

62169261
>>62158666
Skill issue, Satan. There's much fun to be had for free.

62169348
>>62167534
>I only have one perspective so my perspective is right
Great now I know not to take your opinion seriously.

62169412
>>62158557
It's worse to be a wagie, obviously. Why would anyone ever think being NEET is worse? The whole point of working is to save up enough money to be NEET someday.

62169467
>>62169412
Yes and waging gets you more money and expedites that process so you can eventually neet. If you go neet mode with no money you're just suffering and can't truly enjoy life, and the "enjoyment" you have is just consuming media which makes you as much of a goy as a wagie.

62169540
>>62159267
Kierkegaard was based Dane, like Schacht.

62170345
>>62158557
depends on your situation. neet is better when you can actually afford it. if you need money then having a job is better no matter how soul crushing it is most of the time.

62170481
>>62159382
At least you know what checked actually means unlike that other dude.
But honestly man, why would my view be goyish? I am just saying biology will motivate you in life aka a hot woman
>>62169232
Fuck yeah dude. A hot woman keep saying I love you while pulling your hair, moaning and can’t stop herself from kissing you? Yeah I don’t care what she did with who before at that moment
>>62169261
Bro I had a one full terabyte of Skyrim and it’s mod enable on my shit laptop and was playing it without issue, so I have no trouble going around my laptop limitation. I could entertain myself with two absolutly simple games like xcom piretez or dominion 6 (both that I loved) then when I got bored I would used chatgpt to make assets and modded the game to my taste myself and started over, so no, I know how to not get bored either.
Problem is that a shit laptop is just not able to handle all the calculation of ck3 or stellaris (thanks to paradox shit programming) and total war had to be played on low settings.
I don’t like that shit. I don’t wanna be limited like this. Why would I limit myself to some fake and not my favorite, while I can go work, make some money, and get a pc that can handle ALL MY GAMES?
>>62169467
Yep. A smart wagie is a free man.
my problem with being a neet was always lack of safety net, but a wagie has that and he can get out of rat race faster.
>>62169412
Sure, we all love to be neet. But being a retired YOUNG neet, with money and your own car and place, is hard fucking work. (Or luck)
You can either sit on your ass and wish to be like that, have a good luck in lotto or stocks or crypto or work your ass and wage. In the end, the wagie gonna win, because he got more money to dump into stocks and crypto while a neet doesnt.
And god, I fucking WISHED I had my own place right now dude.

62170488
>>62170481
It’s still me, I don’t know why my id keep changing, probably cause I am a phonefag posting at work

62170497
Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.

Neeting and waging are two sides of the same coin. Balance in all things and you will find peace.

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

item.title: Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition — 115 replies — 17.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - Mumbai Warrior Edition

Open thread • Replies: 115 • Updated: 2026-04-29 22:19 UTC

OP

Hello my fellow PolkaCurry brothers. We are again here, for another thread where we discuss everything related to DOT, Mumbai (the city of DOT), curry and more. The last thread was a resounding success, we managed to keep it alive for literally 41 days. We got paid 11500 + 5*150 = 12250 DOT for the thread and are now living in a period of enlightenment while eating with METAL spoons. Brothers, we have truly reached enlightenment. WE, the Mumbai Warriors will strike yet again and collect generations worth of money !

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

Early replies (first 3)

62115437
We are eating with our METAL spoons in Mumbai. No more hands my brethren. We eat with out spoons, like proud warriors.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62115624
>>62115424
>>62115437

Still gonna larp as an Indian?

62115793
>>62115437

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62155237
My brothers... nirvana is near, it's just around the corner. Stack up on DOT right now or get priced out.

62156822
My Mumbai brethren. I've been informed that the Palk Strait will be closed by the Mumbai warriors. We will now toll all ships and they'll have to pay the toll in DOT.

62157778
>>62115424
Im tired

62158070
>>62157778
Good my brother. The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired. You first need to see your darkness in order for you to bring the light. Those who seek the light have experienced immense darkness. Brother, this is a moment of rejoice. Accept your pain, let it go, move on and forgive yourself or the people who have cause it. But remember brother the world is simply an illusion and by that I mean your own perception of reality. It's all inside you and not in the outside world. A river is not beautiful or magnificent, that's your illusion of it. A river is simply water that is moving, nothing more, nothing less. The illusion feels real because just like when you dream the pain feels real, the fear feels real, the sorrow feels real. Once you wake up from the dream you realize that nothing was real, that it was just an illusion. But it is true that when you were in the dream the pain felt real. So, once we see the illusion for what it is it'll start dissolving and once it dissolves that's then the reason to work inside the world without attachments and to help those who are asleep to wake up.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158170
>>62157778
>>62158070
>The first step to enlightenment is to admit and accept that you're tired.
And then the last step to enlightenment is to realize that there are no steps to enlightenment. It was always there. It was just covered by conditioning, traumas, the ego, ... . Once all of those dissolve it'll uncover enlightenment. So, enlightenment isn't an achievement or something you do, it's literally that you stop doing. It's the fact that the doer stops. The watcher and the watched go away. The only thing that remains is the watching.

62158427
>>
Metoo

62158494
>>62158427
... You forgot to green text young Vishnu mind of the block chain. You too what?

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158686
If you try to tell a person, "Hey bro, there's hope. You're not a loser. I have faith in you. I think you're a good person.", what do they do? They argue with you. They're defended against that. They intellectualize, "There may be hope for other people, but there's no hope for me.". Such a potent intellectual defense mechanism. And what are they defending against? The belief of hope. Because hope hurts. If there's zero chance, there's zero need for effort. See, human beings are really resilient. We can live through genocide and holocaust and all kinds of stuff. We can live through all kinds of terrible things, terrible economic times. We're survivors. But don't give us hope, because if we can hope, we can hurt.

Having hope also exposes you to hurt. And hurt is a normal part of life. If you're hurting that means you're human. It's just. Are you going to hurt consciously and change something or are you going to hurt unconsciously and keep on hurting due to the same thing for the rest of your life?

You maybe haven't "You go this" at the moment. You may feel powerless. You may feel down. And at the same time you'll slowly and gradually regain your power. You'll unburden the weight. Sooner or later you'll feel so light you'll start flying. I really believe that, even though it may at the current moment not feel like it. Even though you might feel like the current moment is never ending trust me, it'll all change and reshape into a healthier future. You got this fren who's reading this.

Your dear Vishnu Kumar wishes you are peaceful day. May Vishnu of the mindchain be with and all around you.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62158906
>>62157778
metoo

62158991
>>62158906
That information helps a lot. Thank you for sharing. Now what do we do about that?

62159732
100$ end of bull run. No shot we miss nirvana


Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62161400
What is Gavin Wood up to right now?

62161427
>>62161400
He's back to being CEO of Parity. He also talks at the DOT conventions. He's also a part of the JAM development team. And sometimes he even writes some CP fanfiction to relieve the stress of being a full time awesome guy

62162193
>>62161427
Are you advocating CP?

62162631
>>62162193
Oh little Reyansh we all know you're craving it and are therefore asking. You hear what you want to hear.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162869
>>62162631
Holy shit you are

Jannies delete thread

62162938
>>62162869
Wow, another pedophile self-reporting.

CIA, get him. These two >>62162193 >>62162869 are basically begging for it.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62162977
>>62162938
You advocated for it

Why support a pedo founded project

62163124
>>62162977
>You advocated for it
I did? How?

>Why support a pedo founded project
Because pedos run the world my young one. You have still much to learn. Gavin is running a CP ring. He is part of the ELITE and therefore DOT will make it because Gavin has the necessary pedo connections. They do call him the ephebophil of the mindchain, right? Do you genuinely believe that someone who isn't involved into this kind of stuff can do anything? Of course not young one. If you want to become part of the elite than you need to play like the big dogs. Human sacrifice and a bit of pedophilia goes a long way in these kind of circles. A bit of beef jerky here and there also never hurt anyone.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
The only thing I see is 3 people projecting their inner desires onto an external object. That's just how projection works. It's like this

Outside (Conscious mind): "I am confident" Vessel
o o
-|- |------------> -|-
/ \ | / \
Inside (Unconscious mind): "I am a loser" -----------|

I am just a vessel for you to offload your projection. It's like the pretty girl clique having an "ugly" chick in order to offload their insecurities onto her. Pretty girls consciously feel pretty but unconsciously feel ugly therefore they tend to have an ugly chick in order to offload that ugliness inside of them onto the ugly chick. Exactly what you 3 guys did just right now. You're consciously against pedophilia, because society has programmed you in that way, yet unconsciously you just want a piece of that 14yo meat. It is what it is guys. I don't judge you for it to be honest.

62163165
>>62163149
>>62162977
>>62162869
>>62162193
See picrel. You can't indent on 4chan

62163202
>>62163165

>>62162869
>>62162977
>>62162193
Just like a bully believes he's "confident" but is actually unconsciously a "loser" and then beats other people in order to project that feeling into the external world you guys are also into CP while trying to accuse me, as an "easy" target, in order to externalize your inner conflict. Bros, it's ok. We can all see your urges. Funny how you 3 suddenly jumped on the band wagon while I didn't even say anything about it, right? Funny how your mind simply latched onto it, right? You 3 self-reported. You probably don't even know it yourself. It's like people who are heavily religious and are forbidden to be gay. And then because they're angry at themselves for hating themselves for being closet fags then they do what? They beat up gay people because they're jelaous someone else is openly gay while they hate themselves because they want to taste the forbidden fruit. Just admit it guys, you want to fuck 14yo, right? To be honest, just google "age of consent by country" and go to Italy if you really want to do that. The age of consent in Italy is 14yo therefore it's legal. You just can't film it and it's ok. Don't believe me? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Age_of_consent_by_country. Same goes for Germany. In Argentina it's legal to do it with a 13yo. Austria 14, Chile 14, Peru 14, Angola 14, Hungary 14, Panama 14, Serbia 14. Trinidad and Tobago 12. Bosnia 14, ... You get the jist. If you really want to pursue your inner desires you can LEGALLY do it. It's LEGAL in certain places and therefore it's ok, right? People are just programmed to demonize it, even though IT'S LEGAL in MANY COUNTRIES. You can literally have LEGAL CONSENSUAL SEX WITH A 14YO IN A LOT OF COUNTRIES. Just don't film it or pay for her and it's fine.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62163228
>>62163202
I can feel the throbbing hard cocks and the drooling coming right through my screen while people are reading the message. You guys must be having wild fantasies at this point. You guys are fucking wild. I just gave you a guilt free pass to destroy that 14yo pussy in a legal and socially acceptable way. I just unleashed all hell. Let me guess? You three >>62162193, >>62162869 and >>62162977 are probably holding your throbbing dicks in your hands while buying tickets for Italy. You're already manifesting yourself balls deep inside a fine young 14yo Italian gypsy pussy. You 3 are fucking wild man. WILD. Fucking cinema to say the least. Self-reporting, hilarious.

62163243
>>62162193
>>62162869
>>62162977
I'm am just a mere vessel for you pedophilic desires which society has put under constraint. You're just externalizing your deepest wishes that lie in your shadow. It's time that Vishnu Kumar brings the light and shines upon thy. Once you understand that the pedophile is within there will be no more questions, only realization.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62166550
My Mumbai warriors. Soon it will be our time. Even the ones who are into CP, because obviously we have some cheese pizza connoisseurs in our ranks. It is alright guys. You can travel to Italy to indulge in the finest cheese pizza.

62166786
>>62115424
Oh dotsaars I don't feel good. I feel like a vegetarian vindaloo from a Bangladeshi dalit street vendor help me saars

62166911
>>62163165
>>62163202
>>62163228

You are one fucked up guy
And dont ask how. You know it

62166925
>>62166911
Help me understand. What did I say or do to make you think that?

>>62166786
Emotions go up and emotions go down. There's no up without the down. Just notice your emotional state and sit with it. It's trying to tell you something.

62169593
100$ end of bull run. I just heard from Gavin Wood, the Vishnu lord himself. It is CONFIRMED. They're in talk with MAJOR conglomerates that after JAM the Vishnu chain of the mind will be used as a backdoor tool for reality transformation while traveling towards another dimension of possibilities with their charitable friends. I just made that shit up and nothing I said should and will be taken seriously. This is just a shameless BUMP for the thread.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

62171594
100$ end of bull run CONFIRMED by our CP fanfiction lord Gavin Wood

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar, The leader of the Mumbai Warriors

item.title: crypto is dead. jeets gave up on running rug pulls. no new projects. all of the crypto personalities are dead, were in p… — 13 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
crypto is dead. jeets gave up on running rug pulls. no new projects. all of the crypto personalities are dead, were in p…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-04-30 03:28 UTC

OP

crypto is dead. jeets gave up on running rug pulls. no new projects. all of the crypto personalities are dead, were in prison, are in prison, or are on the run from prison. normies don't give a shit about any of it, they'd rather gamble on niggerball sports betting or prediction markets. it's OVER.

Early replies (first 3)

62171490
I don't think it is. In fact, I've put money on it. Crypto will die if and when the internet dies and not a moment sooner.

62171579
>>62171567
Yeah. You can only catch them if you get lucky and a niggas shills you one in a thread before a nigger faggot janny bans them. That’s how I found Toshi at $3 million and changed my ultra poorfag life.

62171679
>>62171483
Normies will be back once we are nearing ath, you should be buying everything every month

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62171684
>>62171567
>>62171579
definitely bro
definitely
illiquid shitcoins definitely made you a millionaire.

62171715
>>62171490
"crypto" can exist without massively inflated valuations
>>62171679
they're not coming back

62171718
>>62171483
I voted for this

62171741
>>62171679
>normies got scammed once
>twice
>they will be back for a third time after ATH!
>what? they didn't come back after the 100k ath? or the 125k ath?
>no no those were the wrong ATHs...

62172073
>>62171684
>Toshi
>illliquid shitcoin
You’re retarded

62172111
>crypto is dead
>lunc going to $0.33
NGMI

62172352
>>62171741
the 12 year olds last cycle are 18 with jobs now

62172353
>>62172352
>with jobs
yeah, about that...

62172357
ghostchains are dead
you're either already in defi or you're getting left behind
normalfags not needed

also
>>62171483
>>62171679
>>62171741
>normies
gtfo normalfags

62172362
>>62171483
this picture is great except that the call from the nigger department is accept only. it should be decline only.

item.title: Can't even get interviews at $40k jobs — 50 replies — 7.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Can't even get interviews at $40k jobs

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-04-29 21:42 UTC

OP

I previously came from an $80k job. Over 300 applications since late last year.
> just keep trying bro, just keep applying bro
> I don't see you getting interviews bro you're only putting in 10% effort bro you're supposed to make job searching your full time job bro
I'M FUCKING TRYING OK FUCK THIS IS SO UNFAIR!!!!!!!!!!!!
> just adjust your resume to each job
DONE THAT ALREADY BUT DOESN'T DO SHIT

Early replies (first 3)

62166038
Brutal no reply pill, it's truly truly over for real this time.

62166368
>>62165989
same bro im at 350 applications with one interview

I tried walking into retail stores and trying to get an interview and they all say apply online. I apply online and get ghosted by mcdonalds let alone helldesk entry level jobs

62166375
>>62165989
>>62166368
Unironically just keep trying and never give up.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62167934
i would say to add 5x more detail to your resume. the recruiter really has no idea what they are reading.

62167935
>>62167934
women amirite

62167961
>>62165989
in socal you can get a 40k staffing agency job without having to know English

62168080
>>62166382
>>62165989
Have a retard tier resume for retail jobs, you're likely over qualified, if you have any college or high tier employment pull if off and fill in with any lies you can get away with. If I knew you irl I could get you jobs or at least interviews but this betrays a larger issue, if you don't know someone personally you're filtered out of a lot of positions. I told myself a two years ago my only plan was to outlast as many others as possible, my only real motivation to continue. I never thought it would get this bad this quickly, the market continues to gaslight everyone, tell them to work harder. The thread a few days ago laughing at homeless Canadians contemplating MAID made me feel sick. Unironically if I had to restart tomorrow I'd buy some used lawn mowers, fix up a shitty used trailer and go back to landscaping for boomers. I know things are bad right now, but it's going to get way worse.

>t. waking up early tomorrow to go into the office and make it worse for literally everyone.

Capex into datacenters are still going full steam, construction is busier than ever, many of them won't get finished but a lot more will. Power bills go up, restructuring continues meaning even more people vying for any job still available and when it turns around the economy restructuring to productive things will take years. We are also entering a the final 30-45 day window before 500 million to 1 billion starve to death or get real close to it. Haber Bosch is partially shut down and even if it comes back on tomorrow farmers are already getting fucked and avoiding planting if not going under entirely. Much of the unrest and death will be in the third world or at least it will start there. Hard mode hasn't even begun yet.

62168087
Thank the British for killing the Germans. The Germans would have never let something this evil ever happen.

62168109
>>62165989
>ID: iD1Q7
>ID: IDIOT
Kek

OP you don't get it do you?
There was never an AI threat to employment. It's a palatable lie to lull you into compliance as they flood the market with illegals to water down blue collar wages and flood the market with H1Bs to water down white collar wages. You *will* be replaced by Paco and Pajeet. Voting doesn't matter, the left wing politicians love illegals, the right wing politicians love jeets.

>>62166386
>AI was to REPLACE people
>per MIT 96% of all AI pilots were failures resulting in a net negative productivity
>per Forbes, out of 10k CEOs surveyed, 90%+ admit that AI had a net neutral or net negative impact on their business.
AI ain't shit you mouth breather.

62168160
of course if you apply to shitty jobs you are competing with thousands of people

from helpdesk you should get certifications to apply to cloud engineering or cloud security engineering jobs, not stay at the same level

lie on your resume if necessary

62168294
move to texas. specially the midland area.

62168297
>>62165989
what job did you have? You were probably overpaid

62168329
>>62165989
Become a trans girl

62168350
>>62168109

>AI ain't shit you mouth breather.

Have you been living under a rock? Are you even paying attention to the oligarchs and the ruling class? The majority of the global elites are incompetent half-wits and retards. They genuinely believe they can completely replace workers with AI, despite the fact that all of the evidence points to existing systems like Grok and Claude just being glorified LLMs.

62168373
>>62165989
>I joined an IT 3rd party company that underpaid and had a lot of big business clients
>100% clients love me over the owner
>some tried to wrangle me from him
>my skills stood out
Color me surprised when i mentioned to one of the CEO's that I was available and he swooped and immediately got me started in the hiring process. No interview, straight to 90k salary, full time with benefits and as long as I work the 8 hours a day, I can practically choose when I go in / out.
>you submit applications, something infinite competitors do
I guess you and I are not the same, why didn't your skills stand out at your 80k job? Why are you just submitting applications and not actually dominating? Are you the kind of person who listened to what they told you and not questioned everything? That IS the normiest thing you could do anon
>you may be here, but you def are a summerfag

62168384
>>62168350
You're either genuinely retarded or need to take meds. It's a nothing burger. It's always been a nothing burger.
>b-but the AI CEOs said...
Yeah, they're using this advance technique called lying.
>They genuinely believe they can completely replace workers
>Of the CEOs in Forbes survey that had a negative productivity impact, many have already begun hiring back impacted labor
WOAH ITS A FUCKING NOTHING!

>Have you been living under a rock?
Apparently you are if you're this dense.
Or more likely you're a Jeet trying to deflect from people wanting to take away your H1B.

62168401
>>62165989
Same.

62169782
>>62168384

You're clearly a retarded ESL. It doesn't matter what you think as you have zero power or say in the decision making around AI. What matters is what the oligarchs and the C-suites think, even if they're wrong which they clearly are.

62169866
I am once again posting the graph.
We're 2008 bro it's not gonna stop, better start doing side jobs immediately because this could last 6 months or it could last years.

62169884
>>62169866
>Lawn cleanup / landscaping
>Car detailing
>Exterior house painting
>General indoors cleaning
You can doorknock all 4 of these and bring all needed supplies with you, unironically you are not finding a job. We are 2008, stop being delusional, they're gone and not coming back for a long time because they haven't even acknowledged any kind of economic downturn yet.

There are millions of people just like (you) who also can't find jobs, so you have to start aggressively side jobbing right now before they have to also do it to pay bills, being there first is big. Actually acknowledge what you're saying and thinking instead of pretending and make-believe, the job's gone and not coming back.

62169941
>>62169866
We're also experiencing the worst energy crisis in human history even worse than the '73 embargo.

As soon as the AI speculative bubble pops we're gonna see 10% unemployment coupled with 2022 levels of inflation. Basically what the 1970s were like

62169956
>>62169941
Yeah, a stacked crisis
>The last 10 years almost 100% of growth has been in AI
>Energy crisis
>Economic slowdown - no new hiring
>Houses up to insane valuations, more than double 5 years ago in many areas, despite zero real value being added to them
>But the number of new builds under construction and building permits issued has gone DOWN, so construction has already slowed to nearly nothing
For every single piece of the economy besides AI it's complete shit right now, and AI data centers are behind schedule or cancelled at a higher and higher rate.

62169967
go to church and shake some hands

62170149
>>62165989
go apply to amazon. they hire anyone

62171137
>>62167024
Black dude here, this unironically. White men are facing down the same job market black men have had to deal with for decades. Jumping through a billion hoops and humiliation rituals to maybe convince one employer to take a chance on you for 6 months before inevitably cutting you loose, regardless of your performance? Pioneered it with us. Y'all laughed and pretended as if the plan wasn't to start doing it to you at the first possible chance.

Hustle and nepotism. That's the only way out now. Now you understand why we're always wearing basketball sneakers, it's so we're ready to run suicides. :')

62171161
>>62168109
>AI ain't shit you mouth breather.

>AI will stop improving soon because...because it just will okay

62171222
>>62166633
>>62169967
/thread

62171354
>>62166875
That's just true for family.
If you're a jackass that no one likes it doesn't matter if you know them. They won't be willing to stick their neck or for you.

62171361
>>62167036
Unless he's a retard he likely used his own company to fill the 5yr gap.
Don't people really like hiring "entrepreneurs" because you're perceived as a harder worker

62171379
>>62167097
Start looking before you rage quit

>>62168373
Based
Anyone who doesn't want to be retarded should keep this in mind

62171398
Try applying to Indian Tribes. I served on a tribal council, and I can guarantee you that most tribes still make decisions via people reviewing applications, rather than have AI do it. And that all jobs posted by tribes are actual positions.

62171406
I thank the Americans and British for destroying and making society so shit. Imagine how bad things would be right now if the Germans ran the world.

62171434
>>62171361
This. lol.
Don’t forget the people in the hiring process don’t want people better than them.

item.title: This one’s gonna be in the history books — 3 replies — 5.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
This one’s gonna be in the history books

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-30 04:10 UTC

OP

“How did investors buy the 1990s Japan bubble??”

“How did investors buy the 2020s Korea bubble??”

“Japan will build gundams”

“Korea will fuel the AGI superhuman-revolution; memory is the new gold”

Early replies (first 3)

62172226
>>62172167
This time it's different

62172264
I WISH I HAD BEEN SCAMMED INTO BUYING MICRON 1 YEAR AGO

62172462
>>62172167
It’s already priced in. The “ MARKET IS GOING TO CRASH” is a crowded trade which means no one will make money from it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 34 replies — 4.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-04-29 20:30 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62161120
>anyone
What about an awkward autist with barely understandable speech?

62161122
>>62161076
Trumps personal police force ICE would just shoot you for for filming in public

62161134
>walking across
More like driving across and foling yourself hiking for a few minutes

62161135
>>62161076
Oh yeah? So why he didn't get millions of views? Yeah I guess the classic goycattle quote "he didn't work hard enough" right?https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62161142
>>62161135
What part of 'professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached' did you miss?

62161154
>>62161142
>noooooo you must take a photo from your footage that is already in the video as thumbnail put some goycattle shit in it so goycattle watch it
God I fucking hate ecelebs and their "fans". First people to get the bullet before anyone else should be you and them

62161156
>>62161076
There's whores and then there is Mr Beast...

62161182
>professional editing
So you have to pay someone

62161185
>>62161084
same can be said for actors

62161541
>>62161135
It's not the editing though it wouldn't have hurt >>62161142 >>62161154
It's because they didn't talk to other people. Who wants to watch 2000 hours of two fags walking?
They were supposed to do interviews with cleetus and lashonda and other multiculti adventures

62162173
psychopaths should be culled at school age to prevent this kind of thing. Does he not understand you'd need to have money to do this in the first place and wouldn't be able to work for the half a year it took you to do this, along with it being physically grueling

62162184
>>62161076
im tired of seeing mr beast-esque channels all over youtube, what are some actual good channels?

62162212
>>62161154
you not liking something doesn't mean it's not effective, whiny little turd

62162225
>>62162184
>channels
is what ruined it, just look up what you want to see and click the most homely video

62162234
>>62161086
>resume gap = you'll never enter the workforce again
sounds like the economy's problem, call me when applying for jobs is based on competence instead of meaningless retard criteria

62162262
>>62161076
He is somewhat correct, but you have to do it right requires very expensive production team

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

62163322
>>62162173
I think he's more getting at an idea more than specifically advocating people walk across the US. Remember he got famous for saying "Logan Paul" 500,000 times or something i forget the amount, he did a lot of endurance challenges like that which got him famous. I think he's more saying people do something ridiculous and hard and memeable and film it but it cant be easy because then there's no skin in the game its gotta actually be hard.

62164259
>>62162212
Is this Mrbeast? Who the fuck like genuinely what fucking retarded goycattle will watch a video just because he has thumbnail like Mrbeast? Like seriously? They are a fucking meme and odd. Everyone makes fun of them not praise them like it's some sort of magic that will help your videos. Mrbeast is a clown and his goycattle fans are sub 60 IQ

62164413
this jewish white nigger slave is an industry plant, i'm not trusting a single word coming out of its mouth

62164430
>>62161076
>MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US
Fuck it, call me Sam Porter.

62168164
>>62161076
>can get a million subs
This translates to how much in real currency?

62170693
>>62161084
you can say this about anything

62170796
>>62161122
This, so much this...

62171081
>>62168164
$60k to $1M a year depending on your output.

62171130
>>62161076
some buddhist monks did that and got ran over almost immediately

62171132
>>62162786
He's a 27yo YouTuber worth billions who clawed his way out of poverty just by grinding YouTube for five years, from 2012 to 2017. He leveraged his fame to build a burger company and a hugely successful candy company, and he plans to expand to video games and other industries.
